Game.title: Game
Game.description: Represents a multiplayer checkers game session.

board.description: The current state of the board.

turn.description: The player whose turn it is.

lastMove.description: The last move made in the game.

restartRequested.description: Timestamp or count of restart requests.

status.description: The current status of the game.

timestamp.description: The last time the game was updated.

SocialEvent.title: Social Event
SocialEvent.description: An entry in the global social feed.

/artifacts/{appId}/games/{gameId}.description: Collection of active and past multiplayer games.

/artifacts/{appId}/public/data/friendCod.description: Mapping of friend codes to user UIDs.

/artifacts/{appId}/public/data/emails/{e.description: Mapping of email addresses to user UIDs.

/artifacts/{appId}/users/{userId}/friend.description: Friend requests sent to the user.

/artifacts/{appId}/users/{userId}/invite.description: Game invites sent to the user.

/artifacts/{appId}/users/{userId}/messag.description: User inbox for notifications and system messages.

/artifacts/{appId}/users/{userId}/privat.description: Private user data like friends list.

/artifacts/{appId}/admin/sentMessages/hi.description: History of messages sent by admins.
